name: Revision field and Revision Of field are present on a part
steps:
Given the 'Part Revisions' global setting is enabled
Given a part 'PCB Assembly v1' exists with revision 'A' and a 'Revision Of' link pointing to 'PCB Assembly'
Given a user is logged in and on the part detail page for 'PCB Assembly v1'
When the user views the part details
Then the details panel displays 'Revision: A' and 'Revision Of: PCB Assembly'

name: A part revision is itself a full part with its own stock, parameters, and BOM
steps:
Given a part 'PCB Assembly Rev B' is a revision of 'PCB Assembly' with revision code 'B'
Given a user is logged in
When the user navigates to the part detail page for 'PCB Assembly Rev B'
Then the part has its own part number, stock items, parameters, and BOM separate from 'PCB Assembly'
